# DeutschMeister - German Language Learning Platform

## Overview
DeutschMeister (https://deutsch-meister.de) is a comprehensive German learning platform covering CEFR levels A1.1 to B2.2. The site offers grammar lessons, vocabulary, listening exercises, podcasts, AI speaking practice, and a CEFR level placement test.

## Key Features

### German Grammar (64 Topics)
Complete German grammar curriculum organized by CEFR level. Each of the 8 sub-levels (A1.1, A1.2, A2.1, A2.2, B1.1, B1.2, B2.1, B2.2) contains 8 grammar topics. Topics include cases (Nominative, Accusative, Dative, Genitive), articles, prepositions, verb conjugation, word order, and more. All explanations are in English with German examples.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/grammar

### German Level Test (Free CEFR Placement Test)
Free online German proficiency test covering reading, listening, and speaking. The test takes 15-20 minutes and provides instant results showing the user's CEFR level from A1 to B2. Includes adaptive AI speaking assessment.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/level-test

### AI Speaking Practice
AI-powered German conversation practice available 24/7. Users speak with an AI tutor named "Frau Schmidt" who adapts to their level (A1-B2) and provides real-time feedback on grammar and pronunciation. No scheduling required.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/speaking

### German Podcasts for Learners
24 podcast episodes across all 8 CEFR levels (3 episodes per level). Each episode features native speaker audio with full transcripts and translations. Designed for learning on the go.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/podcasts

### Listening Exercises
480 listening dialogues with comprehension questions across all levels. Native speaker audio with varying speeds and accents.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/listening

### Vocabulary
Vocabulary lists organized by CEFR level with audio pronunciation and example sentences.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/vocabulary

### Video Library
Educational videos covering German grammar, pronunciation, and cultural topics.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/video-library

### Reading Lessons
Reading passages with comprehension questions tailored to each CEFR level.
URL: https://deutsch-meister.de/reading

## Content Statistics
- 64 grammar topics (8 per level × 8 levels)
- 24 podcast episodes with transcripts
- 480 listening dialogues
- AI speaking practice for all 8 levels
- Free CEFR placement test (A1-B2)
- Interactive exercises with instant feedback
- Full bilingual support (English/German)

## Technical Features
- Multi-stage grammar lessons with introduction, examples, guided practice, and mastery exercises
- Progress tracking across all content types
- Subscription system with 7-day free trial
- Mobile-responsive design
- Audio playback for all vocabulary, sentences, and examples
- Schema.org markup for SEO (Quiz, PodcastSeries, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage)

## Access Levels
- **A1.1 content:** Free, no signup required
- **A1.2-B2.2 content:** Free account required (7-day trial)
- **AI Speaking Practice:** Trial available, premium plans for unlimited sessions
- **Premium Plans:** Monthly and yearly subscriptions available

## Target Audience
- English speakers learning German
- Self-study learners at all levels (A1-B2)
- Students preparing for German language exams (Goethe-Zertifikat, TestDaF)
- Anyone seeking structured, comprehensive German learning resources

## Main Pages
- Homepage: https://deutsch-meister.de
- Grammar: https://deutsch-meister.de/grammar
- Level Test: https://deutsch-meister.de/level-test
- Speaking Practice: https://deutsch-meister.de/speaking

- Listening: https://deutsch-meister.de/listening
- Vocabulary: https://deutsch-meister.de/vocabulary
- Video Library: https://deutsch-meister.de/video-library
- Reading: https://deutsch-meister.de/reading
- Pricing: https://deutsch-meister.de/pricing
- Dashboard: https://deutsch-meister.de/dashboard
